GHS Strings GHS Short Scale Balanced Nickels 4 Bass Strings Medium Gauge (32.75" Winding) (4700)
['GHS Short Scale Balanced Nickels 4-String Bass Strings Medium Gauge (32.75" winding). GHS is proud to release Balanced Nickel strings for bass, a combination of traditional string materials and modern string design. Wound over a round steel core with a pure nickel final cover, Balanced Nickels have the same number of wraps from string to string. This yields a tone that is deep but focused, with an extremely even response, no matter where you are on the fretboard. The end result is a balance between tension, flexibility, tonality and playability.']
['044-106 Gauge', 'Round steel core with a pure nickel final cover', 'Same Number of wraps from string to string', 'Full tone that is deep, but focused with even response', 'Strikes a balance between tension, flexibility, tonality and playability']

Marvel Super Hero Adventures Figure and Jetquarters Multipack, 3 Action Figures and 3 Vehicles, 5-Inch Toys for Kids Ages 3 and Up (Amazon Exclusive)
['This action figure and vehicle multipack includes 3 figure and 3 vehicles: The Spider-Man Jetquarters, Captain America Victory Racer, and the Iron Man Speedster!Your friendly neighborhood Spider-Man speeds in to save the day in his Jetquarters! The included 5-inch Spider-Man action figure comes with and fits inside the cockpit of an oversized toy Jetquarters, adding to the big fun and excitement of imagining bold rescues and daring escapes. The Spider-Man Jetquarters can also store other Marvel Super Hero Adventures vehicles, like the Captain America Victory Racer (included)!\xa0Given superhuman strength by the Super-Soldier serum, Captain America leads the Avengers into adventure with the Captain America Victory Racer! Open the throttle for adventure with this Marvel Super Hero Adventures Captain America motorcycle! Kids can imagine speeding into adventure alongside Captain America and his friends Spider-Man and Iron Man! I AM IRON MAN! Blast into action and adventure with the Marvel Super Hero Adventures Iron Man Speedster! Place the Iron Man action figure inside the oversized Speedster vehicle and imagine putting the pedal to the metal! Kids will love pretending to shift into high gear to race into action with the Iron Man Speedster figure and vehicle!All 3 figures are compatible with all 3 included vehicles.For even more fun, look for other Playskool Heroes Marvel Super Hero Adventures figures and vehicles to assemble a crime-fighting team! All trademarks and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners.Playskool Heroes and all related terms are trademarks of Hasbro.']

Barbie Pretty in Plaid (Redhead)
['Product description', 'Barbie Pretty in Plaid (Redhead) Green and White checkered dress.', 'Amazon.com', "With her red hair clasped in a hip, top-of-the head ponytail, Pretty in Plaid Barbie from Mattel's Fashion Avenue collection is ready for just about anything. She looks positively groovy in her '60s-inspired daisy-print green-and-yellow-plaid knit dress, which sports a matching yellow plastic belt with pearlized buckle slung low over her hips and yellow shoes on her wee feet. Yellow earrings and a removable ring complete her smart ensemble. This doll is ideal for younger Barbie doll fans, because of her easy-to-remove Velcro-fastened dress, bendable limbs for posing, and long straight hair that's just waiting to be brushed and restyled. (Brush is not included.)", '--Heidi Robinson']

Paiste PST X Swiss Cymbal (), Bronze
['The Paiste Swiss Flanger Stack Cymbal from the PST X Series is a high-quality, built-to-last swiss hi-hat cymbal designed to enhance your percussion performance. Its sound can range from earthy and warm with a dry feel, to washy and complex with a mix of fairly narrow ranges. Depending on how tightly the pair is tightened, it offers a variety of sounds from dry, trashy hi-hat sounds to shattering, noisy-washy crash effects. The core of the PSTX series comprises the Swiss models that achieve their desired sound quality by utilizing specific layouts and varied sizes for the holes. Additionally, its silky surface gives the cymbals an attractive look while its aluminum Pure Bells offer users a distinct character and concept that stands out. With outstanding features such as these at an affordable price point, this exciting addition to your drum kit will help you take your performances to new heights!']
["HIGH-QUALITY SWISS FLANGER STACK CYMBALS - Our PSTX series is a complete collection of extremely affordable effect cymbals. With its core of the Swiss models and silky surface, you'll be sure to enhance your performance and upgrade your drum kit with great sound quality.", 'EARTHY, WARM, & DRY - This range offers a complex mix with a soft, giving and responsive feel. Depending on how aggressively you tighten the pair, you can achieve dry, trashy hi-hat sounds, or even shattering and noisy-washy crash effects!', 'BUILT-TO-LAST DURABILITY - Ensure your Paiste cymbals will be around for years to come! Enjoy the innovative design that stands out visually due to its aluminum Pure Bells concept. Your drummer friends will love it too!', 'CORE DESIGN – The core of these cymbals is made up of a layout that uses specific sizes and holes to produce a noisy, dirty, trashy sound quality. Featuring silky surfaces and aluminum Pure Bells with distinct character and concept.', 'RELIABLE SOURCE FOR CYMBALS - Paiste brings you the best in terms of quality and craftsmanship with their cymbal range. Experience extraordinary low-end and crisp projection as you experience every nuance in your performance with professional quality results each time.']

Toddler A League of Their Own Jimmy Dugan Coach Costume Kids Baseball Player Costume
['The Fun Costumes Toddler A League of Their Own Coach Jimmy Costume This officially licensed Rockford Peaches Jimmy costume for toddlers will transform any little one into the tough-talking, poor mannered character from the beloved cult classic film. Fans of this iconic film love the journey that Tom Hanks\' character made in the movie, and now you can create a family A League of Their Own themed group by including your youngest as the team coach. Product Design: Our entire line of A League of Their Own costumes are officially licensed, and are quality replicas with the details that matter to fans. We\'ll be the first ones to tell you that we are serious movie fans. And we have to say, having your little one as the coach will be a delightful touch; whether his sisters are Kit and Dottie, or even if it\'s your toddler\'s turn to manage the adults on the field as Jimmy! Product Details: 100% polyester Shirt fastens w/ buttons at center front; embroidered patches on sleeve & chest Knee pants have elastic at waist & cuffs; belt loops at waist Belt threads through loops at pants waist, fastens w/ hook & loop closure Red baseball cap has embroidered "R" patch on front adjustable hook & loop fastener at back Red knee-high socks Officially licensed Size Chart: 12MO: Chest=22"; Shirt Length=12"; Waist=16" - 30"; Pants Outseam=11" 18MO: Chest=24"; Shirt Length=13"; Waist=17" - 31"; Pants Outseam=11" 2T: Chest=24 1/2"; Shirt Length=15"; Waist=18" - 32"; Pants Outseam=12" 4T: Chest=26"; Shirt Length=16"; Waist=19" - 33"; Pants Outseam=13" About Us: Fun Costumes are exclusively Made By Us and begin with passion, teamwork, and industry expertise decades in the making. Our products are proof that with the right people even a simple idea can grow into something incredible. We started in a small garage in Minnesota, providing costumes to our local community, and now we\'re creating costumes for people all around the world. - Shirt - Pants - Belt - Cap - Pair of Socks']
['Size: 4T', 'PRODUCT INCLUDES: This officially licensed Toddler Kids Coach Jimmy Costume includes a shirt, belt, cap, pair of pants, and knee-high socks.', "FROM THE FUN COMPANY: Hopping into a costume lets us all become something pretty amazing, so we always want to aim for something great! That's the goal for all of our Made By Us costumes but we think we've knocked it out of the park with this Jimmy Dugan costume from A League of Their Own.", "DETAILS THAT MATTER: Jimmy never quite let go of his star days on the field, so we've made sure to include the full baseball uniform from the film to make your little Jimmy feel like a real ace coach! This A League of Their Own costume features details recreated from movie costumes for a fun family costume theme.", 'QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Our in-house design team loves making costumes based on our favorite films because it gives them a chance to get the details perfect. With high-quality materials and expert construction techniques, this toddler Jimmy costume looks right on your little guy.']
{"Package Dimensions": "15 x 9.49 x 2 inches", "Department": "Boys", "Date First Available": "October 20, 2019", "Manufacturer": "Fun Costumes"}

MusicNomad F-ONE Fretboard Oil Cleaner & Conditioner 2 oz (MN105)
['F-ONE gives wood its life back. F-ONE is formulated using a complex mixture of the finest ultra refined tree and seed oils to clean, condition & protect your fretboard/fingerboard. 100% free of any lemon oil extracts, waxes, petroleum distillates, silicone, and water. We chose not to use any lemon oil because it contains d-limonene, which is a strong solvent that is used to remove paint and glue. In addition, we believe the high acidity levels of lemon oil can dry out the fretboard over time and require more frequent fretboard care. F-ONE leaves your fretboard looking new, playing great and feeling smooth, never sticky or tacky. Our revolutionary formula penetrates & conditions the wood to dry fast and give it a new look for months. We use 100% naturally produced oils and is safe on all unfinished rosewood, ebony and maple fretboards. F-ONE oil is preferred by some of the most respected repair shops in the world. F-ONE is a registered trademark of Big Rock Innovations LLC, all rights reserved.']

Auris Musikinstrument Ab - Diatonic Glockenspiel
['Introduce children to the sound of clear, accurate musical tones with this beautiful Swedish instrument. Mozart and Tchaikovsky used glockenspiels in their works, but you needn t be a musician to successfully teach children a melody or accompany a simple song on this instrument. Eight precision-tuned brass bars span one octave of whole notes (C, D, E, F, G, A, B, C) on the diatonic (Western) scale; no sharps or flats. Base is very stable, with cork feet to prevent sliding and improve resonance. Made in Sweden. 9" x 5"; includes two types of mallets for producing tonal variations. Ages 3 and up.', 'Use instructions', 'Demonstrate how a lightness of touch will create a pur sound. Children will be fascinated when they discover that the rubber mallet produce different sounds than the wood mallet. Many simple folk songs and nursery rhymes can be played on the glockenspiel. The names of the notes (C, D, A, etc.) are engraved on the brass bars for children who are not yet reading music in standard notation. Playing card expert, Lee Asher, recognized the unique quality and feel of these cards and began evangelizing about them. In due course, Jerry's Nugget playing cards became legendary. After more than three years of pursuit and negotiation, a deal with Jerry's Nugget Casino and Expert Playing Card Company is making them available again! ['Classics Custom cymbals from MEINL are designed to cut above the roar of guitars, doing most of the work for you so you don\'t have to play as hard to be heard. MEINL utilizes a B10 bronze alloy to make these cymbals pack a loud and bright punch with rich musical tones. Included in this Classics Custom set of cymbals are 14" medium hi hats, a 16" medium crash, 20" medium ride, and a 18" medium crash. These commonly found cymbal sizes will complete a drum set up and offer a full range of sounds for players to dig in and let their voice be heard. The Classics Custom 14" medium hi hats provide a crisp, bright \\"chick\\" sound with excellent stick definition. These hi hats have a medium range pitch with plenty of cut and projection that allows them to easily blend well on stage. The 16" and 18" medium crashes have an immediate response with a full-bodied sustain mixed with mid-ranged tones to provide a great overall wash. The 20" medium ride combines a well-defined ping with a shimmering sustain and mid-range pitched undertones. The bell is penetrating, yet not overpowering for adding colorful accents or when the music level has peaked. Classics Custom cymbals are recommended for most styles of music, including Metal, Rock, Pop, Fusion, and Studio. The MEINL cymbal cleaner (model# MCCL) works great to restore and maintain shine on these brilliant finish cymbals.']

On top of the ability to customize the look of your Dewback rider, This unit Expansion gives you plenty of ways to tweak how this unit operates in the thick of battle. Six upgrade cards accompany the miniature, letting you modify its armament, training, or the comms systems It carries into battle. Rounding out this expansion are a unit card and all the tokens you need to deploy it as a support unit for your Imperial armies."]

HUDY Diff Grease
['HUDY Diff Grease is a high-performance, model racing car general-purpose silicone based grease, formulated to provide extra protection against wear, corrosion, and water.HUDY Diff Grease is recommended for most types of rotating and moving parts in any RC car. This silicone grease is especially well-suited for use in ball differentials, axial (thrust) bearings, and in any other ball-bearings that require grease. Suggested for use in any heavy-duty application where high pressures or loads are present. This grease provides excellent protection against rust and corrosion while resisting water wash-out, making it particularly suitable for racing in wet conditions. The silicone grease operates within a large temperature spectrum and will work in all extreme conditions up to and over 100°C. HUDY Diff Grease comes in a handy small tube and is easy to apply.Applications: HUDY Diff Greae is recommended for multipurpose use in normal to heavy-duty applications, including the lubrication of ball-bearings, axial bearing (thrust) bearings, diff shims and pins under normal operating conditions. It is particularly recommended for high load parts and areas or where severe vibration is a problem. HUDY Diff Grease is suitable for the lubrication of flexible couplings such as universal or CVD joints. The good water tolerance and rust/corrosion protection make HUDY Diff Grease particularly well suited to wet racing.']

COBI Historical Collection World War II Battleship Bismarck, Executive Edition
['The Bismarck was a German World War II battleship commissioned on August 24, 1940. It was the largest Kriegsmarine ship next to its twin "Tirpitz". On September 28, 1940, Bismarck made her maiden voyage. She was sunk on May 27, 1941, during a naval battle. The special   of the famous battleship Bismarck has been expanded with a figure of a German captain in a distinctive uniform. In addition, part of the deck can be removed to see the detailed design of the engines. The set also includes two black plates containing the name of the ship, scale and basic technical data. The plates can be attached to the display block stand. The all-new Bismarck model created by COBI was produced in a scale of 1:300. It consists of 2933 elements and is 86.5 cm long. The latest edition of Bismarck is a ship designed completely from scratch. It contains over 900 more bricks compared to older editions. It faithfully reflects the proportions of the historical ship and preserves all its essential elements, including the original camouflage. The design depicts the so-called "Baltic paint scheme", i.e., camouflage containing black and white stripes and red tops of artillery towers. Such colors were used during training in the Baltic Sea. Numerous blocks feature high-quality, abrasion-resistant prints! The model has numerous movable parts such as propellers, rudders, rotating turrets and gun barrels that can be raised and lowered. The model is huge, has great display value and we especially recommend it to enthusiasts of naval history and building block collectors. It does not require gluing or painting because its entire body and all elements consist of COBI construction blocks.']
['2933 high-quality elements', 'This historical 1:300 scale historical block model replica includes a Captian figure', 'Plates with the name and data of the ship compliments the included display stand', 'Clear and intuitive instructions based on illustrations and step-by-step directions', 'Fully compatible with other brands of construction blocks']

['Get ready for hours of thrilling and challenging fun with "Matty\'s BIG Mix-Up" 51pc GIANT Colorful Wooden Tumble Tower Deluxe Stacking Game with Storage Bag! The set includes 51 brightly colored wooden blocks that are perfect for building an impressive tower. The objective is to carefully balance and stack the blocks without letting the tower fall. But here\'s the twist: players take turns rolling the dice, and the color indicated on the dice determines which block must be removed from the tower. It\'s a test of skill, strategy, and a steady hand! With two ways to play, either 3 or 4 across, you can customize the gameplay experience to your liking. The tower starts at an impressive height of either 12.5 inches or 17 inches, depending on the variant you choose. Challenge yourself and your friends to reach new heights of stacking prowess! It\'s perfect for schools, party games, special needs activities, birthday gifts, daycare centers, office fun, travel entertainment, and even as a unique drinking game for adults. The possibilities are endless! Designed for players aged 5 and up, this giant tumble tower game is suitable for the whole family to enjoy. The tower measures either 12.5 inches or 17 inches tall at the start, creating an exciting visual spectacle during gameplay. Each wooden block measures 7 inches in length, 1.75 inches in width, and 1 inch in thickness, providing a solid foundation for your tower-building endeavors. To make storage and transportation a breeze, a convenient storage bag is included with the set. Keep all the pieces organized and ready for the next round of stacking fun. MilesMagic Magician's Set of 10 Utility Switch Envelopes Gimmick Mind Prediction Mentalism Card Magic Trick
['THE  SWITCH  MAGIC TRICK Utility envelope switches for the working Mentalist. If you are searching for the simple & organic looking prop to switch folded paper or card, this is the one easy and perfect tool. Effect: Magician shows a deck of a playing card and asks the spectator to shuffle and select any one card randomly and keep it on the table without seeing a face, now he shows one simple paper envelope and slid the selected card inside. The magician now shows one paper having a prediction. And ask the spectator to hold it. When both envelope and prediction is open audience will find exact same card suit and number written on prediction paper. Another Effect: magician borrows anyone (say 100 Rupee) currency bill and asks the spectator to push inside envelope and keep it on the table. Now magician writes one number on board. After writing number he takes out the same currency bill from the envelope and read the number on the bill. It found the exact same which is written on board. This is just one of the countless ways to use this envelope. Countless possibilities, limited only by your imagination Comes 10 Envelopes in one pack with basic Instruction sheet. Note: Envelopes can be reuse use again and again if not stick.']
['Easy to use & Self-contained. Predict any playing card, number, bill, suit, place etc..', 'This is the one easy and perfect tool for Mentalism with Countless possibilities, limited only by your imagination.', 'Comes 10 Envelopes in one pack with basic instruction sheet. Envelopes can be reuse use again and again if not stick.', 'Easy yet so impactful that it is loved and used not only by the beginners but the kids, adults or professional magicians as well and can be performed in the opening act as it would definitely steal the show.', 'This is the newest way to predict anything - a thought-of card, a name, a number - even a drawing - all with your prediction sealed inside an envelope - before you even ask the spectator to think of it.']

Canailles Scotch & Soda, Magic Bang Coin Trick Set: Transform a Penny to a Dime Instantly, Includes Bang Ring
["Unleash your magical prowess with our distinctive U.S Penny (2014 strike date) and Dime version of the classic Scotch and Soda magic trick. This beautifully designed set includes coins that appear completely ordinary, allowing you to wow your audience with unbelievable magic right before their eyes. The Set: Copper-Colored Penny (Scotch): This isn't just a penny. Designed to deceive even the most observant spectators, this coin divides into two. One half is a meticulously crafted shell, indistinguishable from an everyday penny. Silver-Colored Dime (Soda): Hidden inside the penny shell is the second part of the coin, ingeniously designed to mirror the back of a conventional dime. How It Works: The two parts of the penny fit together seamlessly, creating the illusion of a regular, intact penny. When separated, they transform in an astounding feat of magic, as the penny seemingly becomes a dime, leaving your audience amazed. Also included in this set is a Bang Coin Band, a specialized tool that aids in the effortless separation and resetting of the coins, allowing for seamless repeated performances. Constructed from robust material, the band is designed for longevity, offering magical convenience whether you're practicing or performing. Whether you're a magic novice or a seasoned performer, this trick is straightforward to master and always leaves a lasting impression. Bring the magic of surprise to gatherings, parties, or impromptu performances with this intriguing Scotch and Soda Coin Trick Set - your secret weapon for unforgettable magic moments!"]
['Transformative Trick: Premium Scotch and Soda coin set featuring a U.S Penny (2014 strike date) and Dime, designed for an impressive, seamless magic transformation.', 'Precision-Made Coins: Ingenious design allows the penny to split into two parts - a copper-colored shell and a dime-like insert, all under the guise of a regular penny.', 'Easy-To-Use Tool: Includes a durable Bang Coin Band, enabling effortless separation and resetting of the coins for smooth, repeated performances.', 'Suitable for All Levels: Ideal for beginners and experienced magicians alike, offering an easy-to-learn but highly impactful magic trick for any occasion.']

Milton Bradley Trivial Pursuit POP Culture DVD Game
['Product Description', 'Put your pop culture know-how to the test with the Trivial Pursuit Pop Culture DVD edition. The 6 question categories cover the topics everyone loves to talk about—Movies, TV, Music, Sports/Games, Buzz and Fads—over 2000 all-new questions. DVD includes fun TV clips, commercials, movie scenes and memorable pop culture moments. Even the tokens have a cool pop culture design. Includes game board, DVD, Q&A cards, 1 die, 4 tokens, 30 scoring wedges and instructions. Imported and made in USA.', 'Amazon.com', 'Count on Trivial Pursuit to keep up with new millennium trends. This tremendously popular game has been updated with a fun DVD feature that allows players to view TV clips, songs, commercials, movie scenes, and more tidbits from pop culture. As in the original Trivial Pursuit game, two to four adult players (or teams) pose questions to one another in six categories, in this case TV, Fads, Buzz, Music, Movies, and Sports & Games. As they correctly answer questions, players move around the board, collecting colored wedges. To win a scoring wedge, though, players must answer an on-screen question with a variety of visual cues. So rev up those pop culture engines and get ready to come up with the name of Big Star\'s first record or the candy Ronald Reagan favored. The game includes game board, DVD, 400 question-and-answer cards, one die, four cute tokens (lava lamp, mixed tape entitled "Awesome Mix/Makeout Tunes," cell phone, and joystick), 30 scoring wedges, and instructions. Note: although the game features over 2,000 new questions, only a few hundred of them are DVD questions, leading to inevitable repetition.', '--Emilie Coulter']

Castle Creations PHX Edge 80 HV - 80 Amp Electronic Speed Controller
['With the debut of the Phoenix Edge series of ESCs the next evolution in speed controller technology has arrived. The Edge series introduces a user programmable auxiliary wire capable of functions modelers have only dreamed of, until now. The white auxiliary wire can be used for helicopter governor gain input adjustments mid-flight, serve as an audible beacon after an "unexpected landing", act as an RPM output for 3-axis gyros that support RPM sensors, be used as an ESC arming lock (coupon for free Arming Lockout Key included) or as a receiver arming lock. Combined with the data logging capability the Edge series of controllers offer, users can enjoy unparalleled versatility. The Phoenix Edge series is intended for use in helicopters ranging from 450 to 800 size and fixed wing aircraft up to 1.20 size and larger. As always, the Edge series of controllers offer industry-leading software functions, data logging and USB programming capability via Castle Link USB adapter (free with included coupon).']

KSQD1 - Squid Universal Mount for boom poles and other tube shaped objects
['The Squid, a multi-purpose mounting solution to connect a transmitter, monitor, mobile device or remote to a boom pole, tripod or other tube shaped objects. Made of strong elastic silicone, the lightweight,', '(0.74oz / 21 g)', 'Squid solidly holds the device with a silicone barrier that shields equipment, acting like a shock absorber. Made of see-through silicone, the low-profile Squid lets the user easily view controls and status monitors. With the trend toward wireless booming and smaller size transmitters, it’s become common to attach a transmitter to the top end of the boom pole. Boom operator Kevin Cerchai explains “I found that by attaching the transmitter to the top of my boom pole, I get better RF range. However, previously when the transmitter was plugged directly into the microphone on the shock-mount, it didn’t stay in place well. Now the Squid solves this problem by creating a buffer between the transmitter and the pole and secures it in place. It also removes tension from the connector.” The Squid will hold mini-transmitters as well as traditional plug-on transmitters. And the elastic silicone firmly holds the device even when swinging the boom. Another popular application is to attach an on-board viewing monitor or a mobile phone to the bottom section of a boom pole. It works with any tube shaped object like the legs of a tripod, the antenna mast, C-stands, handles on sound carts and more - even bicycles. Cameras with gimbals are finding their way to the top of boom and camera poles, creating drone-like shots without the risk, expense and permits associated with drones use. The Squid allows viewing devices and remotes to be easily attached to the bottom section of a pole, to help get that dynamic drone look. The Squid is an ideal tool for any boom operator, sound mixer or other crew on the set. The Squid is also a great phone mount for bikes.', 'Only includes Silicone Squid!']

Seymour Duncan Invader High Output Humbucker Pickup Set with True Tune Tuner, Care Kit and Picks 11108-31-B
['The Invader Set is the tried and true solution for guitarists who seek the heaviest metal tone imaginable. The Invader neck looks intimidating and yields thick crunch and moaning sustain. The ceramic magnets add depth and clarity while the large hex caps deliver smooth string-to-string balance. The Invader bridge’s power comes from the combination of specially overwound coils and three large ceramic magnets, along with its striking oversized metal oxide pole pieces. These expand the overall magnetic field and widen the frequency spectrum, which is why every note played through an Invader sounds so rich. It delivers the thickest and deepest low end response of any passive pickup we make. Chords sound deep and almost subsonic with lower tunings and balance nicely with the crunchy treble that keeps everything well defined. Hand built in our Santa Barbara, CA factory, the Invader uses a three large ceramic bar magnets, oversized metal oxide poles, nickel silver bottom plate, 4-conductor lead wire for multiple wiring options, and is vacuum wax potted for squeal-free performance.']

This led to the idea of practice playing cards designed exclusively for throwing, that could withstand hundreds of throws, and that made an audible \'cry\' when slicing through the air. But you don\'t have to be a major league pitcher to create an impressive sonic boom. These cards have a uniquely shaped, die-cut, set of holes, designed to optimize the signature \'scream\' while ripping through the air. Banshees are the result of an unyielding attention to craftsmanship and the first ever playing cards that are the new standard to creating impact with your card throwing. About the Piedmont Blues Set Piedmont Blues, or East Coast Blues, was born in the American Southeast during the 1900s. Out of its diverse influences arose some of Americas most well known blues harmonica players. What better way to recognize its ongoing influence than with a set of unique harps? The Piedmont Blues set presents the beginning harmonica player with an affordable way to sample playing in seven different keys (G, A, Bb, C, D, E, F). ['One vehicle – three builds! Give the young builder in your life a fun and exciting model kit to build with: the Meccano Junior Pull-Back Buggy! As your young inventor assembles their very own Pull-Back Dune Buggy, ATV or Off-Road Truck (one at a time), they’ll learn how principles from science, technology, engineering, arts and maths are practically applied. Your child can customise their build with the included stickers and attach the finishing pieces to give their vehicle a realistic look! Then, pull the vehicle back and watch it go! ['Featuring the smooth, sleek look of the Chelby levers is reflected in their functionality. Compared to the standard Roosebeck harp levers, the Chelby levers are mechanically superior. Professional harpists appreciate the red and blue colored caps, which make it easy to locate the C- and F-string levers. The lever is attached to its base by a hex bolt. A synthetic washer is spaced between the lever and base, creating a smooth and controlled, lifting action that resists slipping once engaged. The base of each lever is mounted to the harp arm by two screws, should any adjustment be necessary. The bridge pins for the Chelby levers have also been improved; they can be adjusted, in or out, by simple turning with a hex wrench. 22 DuPont hard nylon strings, a range from C3 to C6, 22 Chelby sharpening levers, engraved and inlaid walnut frame and a high quality ply soundboard for exceptional sound and strength. J Concepts 316805 Renegades Monster Truck Tire, Gold Compound (1 Pair)
['During the glory days of monster truck racing, cut tread became a popular method of reducing weight or altering a pattern in order to tune to specific track conditions. The Renegades tire by jconcepts represents the low-profile carcass and cut-tread movement, capable of winning results straight out of the package. The chevron style lugs has been created with specially designed back-cut tread and shaved carcass areas imitating the real thing. At rotation, The tread still stands tall and provides a hefty edge of forward grip in a variety of conditions. The back-cut section provides a small transition during high-speed Corning which conforms to changing terrain and obstacles. The low-profile stance of the Renegades stays very flat during competition, speed-runs, or general use. The tire carcass profile holds the weight extremely low while the design of the tire beads allows just the right amount of contact patch for gluing and application. The Renegades measure in at 5.80 x 4.0 x 2.6".The "gold" Compound excels on carpet, AstroTurf and polished concrete surfaces and expands less during high-speeds.These tires directly fit the Axial SMT10 grave Digger and Max-D RTR monster truck kit with the addition of concepts #3377 tribute wheels.']
